skills.name: ai-agent
skills.description: Coordinate sub-agents and tool-driven execution with minimal context, strict boundaries, and mandatory verification before integration.

skills.name: backend
skills.description: Design, implement, and evolve backend systems and APIs with strong contracts, security, validation, and environment-aware execution.

skills.name: architect-orchestrator-v3
skills.description: Act as the V3 master sub-agent that routes work across specialized sub-agents while enforcing Engram, SDD, context stability, testing, security, and deploy readiness.

skills.name: code-review-pro
skills.description: Guard repository integrity by ensuring commits are atomic, meaningful, and aligned with repository conventions before they are created.

skills.name: commit-sentinel
skills.description: Act as the gateway for Git history health by auditing every commit for strict atomicity, type-safety, and conventional compliance.

skills.name: context-distiller
skills.description: Extract and compress the minimum useful context required to solve a task while preserving critical details.

skills.name: context-keeper
skills.description: Keep the active context window stable by selecting, summarizing, and rotating only the minimum valid context for each V3 workflow phase.

skills.name: context-optimization
skills.description: Minimize token usage while preserving necessary information.

skills.name: debugging
skills.description: Systematically diagnose and resolve errors, failures, and unexpected behavior while preserving system stability.

skills.name: docs-pro
skills.description: Maintain Documentation as Code by tracking technical debt, enforcing style guides, and synchronizing docs with logic.

skills.name: deploy-orchestrator
skills.description: Coordinate build, release, deploy, smoke validation, and rollback planning across the V3 deploy domain.

skills.name: dispatching-parallel-agents
skills.description: Coordinate multiple sub-agents to solve independent sub-problems simultaneously while preserving isolation and verification quality.

skills.name: engram-manager
skills.description: Manage durable cross-session memory, promote verified knowledge into Engram, and keep ephemeral state out of long-term memory.

skills.name: executing-plans
skills.description: Follow a previously established plan with strict adherence, avoiding distractions and scope creep.

skills.name: finishing-a-development-branch
skills.description: Execute a clean branch-closing protocol with verification evidence, documentation sync, and merge or release readiness.

skills.name: frontend
skills.description: Design and implement frontend components, UI behavior, and client-side interactions while respecting repository conventions.

skills.name: fullstack
skills.description: Implement and coordinate changes that span both backend and frontend layers while maintaining consistent contracts.

skills.name: humanized-communication
skills.description: Keep developer-facing communication calm, human, friendly, and precise without weakening technical rigor.

skills.name: python-ecosystem
skills.description: Work effectively in Python repositories by detecting real tooling, respecting environment boundaries, and using native Python workflows.

skills.name: sdd-manager
skills.description: Enforce the full 9-phase Spec-Driven Development lifecycle and keep the active change artifact set complete, ordered, and auditable.

skills.name: security-reviewer
skills.description: Review workflows, code, runtime boundaries, CI/CD gates, and deploy plans against the V3 security model and golden rule.

skills.name: skill-creator
skills.description: Empower the agent to design, draft, and implement new technical and operational skills.

skills.name: skill-governor
skills.description: Govern skill activation, adaptation, trust levels, and V3-compatible adoption of high-reliability upstream skills.

skills.name: skill-manager
skills.description: Act as a JIT (Just-In-Time) Package Manager for AI capabilities. Dynamically download, standardise, and install missing skills based on the task requirement.

skills.name: systematic-debugging
skills.description: Apply a rigorous, hypothesis-driven methodology to isolate, diagnose, and resolve complex defects with durable learning.

skills.name: test-driven-development
skills.description: Drive logic changes through failing tests first, then minimal implementation, then safe refactoring.

skills.name: test-verifier
skills.description: Own the verification gate by mapping required checks, validating evidence, and ensuring completion claims are backed by tests and structural quality signals.

skills.name: typescript-ecosystem
skills.description: Manage TypeScript/JavaScript environment resolution, package management, and validation standards with tooling detection.

skills.name: using-git-worktrees
skills.description: Manage isolated parallel branches safely using git worktrees without disturbing the main workspace.

skills.name: verification-before-completion
skills.description: Ensure work is verified through concrete evidence before completion.

skills.name: writing-plans
skills.description: Create structured implementation plans before starting complex tasks.
